evaluation_layers.calibrated_alert: HMM plus inner-selected Pre-fall advisory threshold
evaluation_layers.hmm: calibrated probabilities with the light HMM
evaluation_layers.note: ADL lying/static-posture product rules are intentionally evaluated separately; these metrics describe the deep component, not the final product output.
evaluation_layers.raw: calibrated softmax argmax without sequence rules

selection_rule: Within each outer fold, choose the candidate with the highest calibrated-alert macro F1 among candidates meeting the Pre-fall recall floor; outer test labels are not used for weight, epoch, temperature, or threshold selection.
